description: SDR motif/active-site/cofactor residue analysis + evidence matrix artifact for sou1
code:
import re
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd

seq="MTSMFSLKGKTTLITGGSGGIGFSIAKAFAAAGSNVGLLYGRNKKALEYAAELRDKHGVQAKAYSCPIENRSAVIETTNQAVEELGGRLDVMIANAGIAIPHLSLEDKNEDIWTKVVGINLNGAYYTAQAAGHHFKKQGKGSLIFTASMSGHIANWPQQWASYHATKAAVKHLARALAVEWAPFARVNSVSPGYIDTDLTLYADENLRKKWKEYTPQARIGLPDELPGAYLYLASDASSYCTGSDIIVDGGYCSR"
print("Length:", len(seq))

# 1) Rossmann glycine-rich cofactor motif TGxxxGxG (SDR fingerprint)
m=re.search(r"TG..[A-Z]G.G", seq)   # T-G-x-x-x-G-x-G
gm=re.search(r"G.{2}G.G", seq[8:24])
print("\nGlycine-rich motif region (res 11-22):", seq[10:22], "-> TGGSGGIG canonical SDR fingerprint")

# 2) Catalytic YxxxK motif (SDR catalytic Tyr + Lys)
for mm in re.finditer(r"Y...K", seq):
    print("YxxxK catalytic motif at res %d-%d:"%(mm.start()+1,mm.end()), mm.group())

# 3) Cofactor-discriminating region (end of betaB strand, ~res 33-45)
region=seq[32:46]
print("\nCofactor-discriminating region (res 33-46):", region)
basic=[(i+33,a) for i,a in enumerate(region) if a in "RK"]
acidic=[(i+33,a) for i,a in enumerate(region) if a in "DE"]
print("  Basic residues (NADP 2'-phosphate binders):", basic)
print("  Acidic residues (NAD adenosine-ribose Asp discriminator):", acidic)
print("  => NO Asp/Glu at betaB C-terminus; basic cluster R42/K44/K45 present => NADP-preference signature")

# Build evidence matrix table
rows=[
 ["Fold/family","InterPro IPR002347 SDR_fam; Pfam PF13561; Gene3D Rossmann","SDR / NAD(P)-binding Rossmann fold","CONFIRMED"],
 ["Glycine fingerprint","TGGSGGIG (res11-22) = TGxxxGxG","Classical SDR coenzyme motif","CONFIRMED"],
 ["Catalytic tetrad","Tyr-x-x-x-Lys (YHATK) + upstream Asn/Ser","Functional SDR active site","CONFIRMED"],
 ["Cofactor NADP+","Basic cluster R42/K44/K45, no acidic Asp discriminator; UniProt kw NADP; ortholog NADPH","NADP+ preference","SUPPORTED"],
 ["Substrate=arabitol","No assay; ortholog=sorbose/fructose; PANTHER=L-xylulose reductase-related","Arabitol specificity","UNSUPPORTED"],
 ["Sorbose reductase","S.pombe cannot assimilate L-sorbose (UniProt CAUTION)","Sorbose-specific fn","REFUTED (species-level)"],
]
df=pd.DataFrame(rows,columns=["Feature","Evidence","Interpretation","Verdict"])
print("\n",df.to_string(index=False))

fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(13,3.2)); ax.axis('off')
t=ax.table(cellText=df.values,colLabels=df.columns,loc='center',cellLoc='left')
t.auto_set_font_size(False); t.set_fontsize(8.5); t.scale(1,1.6)
ax.set_title("SPAC8E11.10 (sou1/Q9Y6Z9): SDR fold & cofactor-specificity evidence",fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig("sou1_evidence_matrix.png",dpi=140,bbox_inches='tight')
print("\nsaved sou1_evidence_matrix.png")
